BOREALISCARDS2-GLASSBLOWER.description:
Channel 1 [gold]Glass[/gold].
Every {Cards:diff()} 0{energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} {Cards:plural:Attack|Attacks} you play in a turn, put this into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
BOREALISCARDS2-GLASSBLOWER.title: Glassblowing
